items.headline: Scanner focus narrowing to APT
items.market_implication: Mode is baseline; only the strongest Coinbase-actionable names are surviving the intake filter. Top momentum lead is APT at 10.3%.

items.headline: Facing a crisis, Bitcoin treasury companies need to pivot to survive
items.market_implication: Here, Wellener offers tactics that firms must use to prove they’re more than just a crypto play.

items.headline: Strategy’s latest massive bitcoin purchase offers insight into its evolving funding model
items.market_implication: A $1.18 billion preferred stock raise, roughly equivalent to 16,800 BTC, signals a shift away from common stock as dividend obligations top $1 billion.

items.headline: Popular Solana wallet Phantom wins CFTC nod to access regulated derivatives markets
items.market_implication: This means Phantom can act as a non-custodial interface connecting users to registered derivatives platforms, removing the need for broker registration under specific conditions.
